task.title: Move web UI out of adapter layer
task.summary: Move browser UI source from adapter ownership to src/ui/web while keeping adapters focused on harness/protocol launch and translation.

goal.outcome: Browser UI code lives under src/ui/web and delegates semantics to application tools, while adapters only launch/connect or translate harness/protocol concerns.
acceptance: src/ui/web owns browser UI rendering/server assets currently under src/adapters/web.
Pi adapter launch commands delegate to UI/application APIs without importing UI semantics as adapter business logic.
Web UI does not import Pi SDK/TUI packages, hosted CDNs, or adapter-only APIs.
Docs/frontmatter code_paths are updated from current src/adapters/web to src/ui/web only after the path exists.
Package exports, smoke tests, and pack dry-run include the moved UI assets correctly.
non_goals: Do not redesign the UI feature set during the move.
Do not make web UI a hosted service or agent harness adapter.
verification: manual /wiki-ui or equivalent smoke if available

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context and must cite checked content proof.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence and cite checked content proof.

summary: Moved Control Room browser UI source from adapter layer to src/ui/web with adapter compatibility wrapper and updated tests/docs paths.

evidence: Updated control-room and hot-context smoke imports to src/ui/web/control-room.ts; build smoke fixture paths now use src/ui/web/control-room.ts.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Updated control-room and hot-context smoke imports to src/ui/web/control-room.ts; build smoke fixture paths now use src/ui/web/control-room.ts.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: src/ui/web owns browser UI rendering/server assets currently under src/adapters/web.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Moved full Control Room implementation to src/ui/web/control-room.ts; src/adapters/web/control-room.ts is now compatibility re-export.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Pi adapter launch commands delegate to UI/application APIs without importing UI semantics as adapter business logic.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: src/adapters/pi/commands/ui.ts imports startControlRoomServer from src/ui/web/control-room.ts and keeps only launch/open command handling.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Web UI does not import Pi SDK/TUI packages, hosted CDNs, or adapter-only APIs.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: grep confirms src/ui/web/control-room.ts imports only domain/application/local modules; no @earendil-works, adapter imports, hosted cdn/http refs.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Docs/frontmatter code_paths are updated from current src/adapters/web to src/ui/web only after the path exists.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Updated .codewiki/kb product/system UI docs from src/adapters/web to src/ui/web after creating path.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Package exports, smoke tests, and pack dry-run include the moved UI assets correctly.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: npm run test:pack includes src/ui/web/control-room.ts and compatibility wrapper; control-room/hot-context smoke tests and npm test pass.

closure_brief.user_intent: Move web UI out of adapter layer for TASK-088.
implemented_changes: Moved Control Room implementation to src/ui/web/control-room.ts.
Updated Pi UI launch command and smoke tests.
non_goals_preserved: No hosted service or agent harness adapter.
remaining_risks: Compatibility wrapper remains until downstream imports migrate.

risks: Compatibility wrapper keeps src/adapters/web in package temporarily; future cleanup can remove after downstream imports migrate.

commit.title: chore(codewiki): record TASK-088 Move web UI out of adapter layer implementation evidence
commit.body:
Moved Control Room browser UI source from adapter layer to src/ui/web with adapter compatibility wrapper and updated tests/docs paths.

Checks: npm run typecheck, node tests/smoke/control-room.test.mjs, node tests/smoke/hot-context.test.mjs, npm run test:pack, npm test
Validation: no durable validation refs recorded.
Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.
